content: Hello, just curious if anyone in the community using dataverse-globus with high assurance collections, particularly @Victoria Lubitch or @Deirdre Kirmis

We have Globus (per dataverse-globus) available and it works, but we haven't really had much opportunity to use it for very many projects so far. We've tested it a lot :sweat_smile: , but we have been able to use DVWebloader for the larger datasets that we've had to transfer files to recently. One of these days a big project from our HP cluster will come to us and then we'll get to use it!
